notes: Adidas press page (news.adidas.com) blocked by CDN. Use general press inquiry via adidas-group.com/en/media/newsroom or LinkedIn outreach. Large brand — music partnerships typically handled via Adidas Originals division.

Nike newsroom at about.nike.com/en/newsroom — no public email listed. Press contacts gated. Nike music partnerships run through Nike Entertainment Marketing / Jordan Brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Nike Brand Partnerships Manager.'

Full press contacts at about.puma.com/en/contact. Teamhead Corporate Comms: Robert Bartunek. Also: Eva-Maria Boehm (Senior Manager Corp Comms), Denise Thrasher (US comms). Multiple regional contacts available.
New Balance press/contact pages blocked by WAF. Known to work with external PR agencies for music collabs. Try LinkedIn for 'New Balance Brand Partnerships' or 'New Balance Entertainment Marketing.'
Salomon press page not publicly accessible. Parent company: Amer Sports. Salomon has been active in fashion/culture partnerships. Try LinkedIn for 'Salomon Sportstyle Marketing' team.
Asics corporate press (corp.asics.com/en/press) has press releases but no public contact emails. Try LinkedIn for 'ASICS Brand Partnerships' or 'ASICS Sportstyle Marketing.'
Hoka is owned by Deckers Brands. Press page minimal. Hoka has been expanding into lifestyle/culture space. Try Deckers Brands PR or LinkedIn for 'Hoka Brand Marketing.'
Under Armour newsroom gated. Entertainment/music partnerships less common vs Nike/Adidas. Try LinkedIn for 'Under Armour Brand Partnerships.'
Reebok now owned by Authentic Brands Group. Contact pages redirected. Try LinkedIn for 'Reebok Brand Partnerships' or contact ABG directly.
Vans (owned by VF Corporation) has strong music/culture DNA. Press page gated. Vans has dedicated music partnerships team. Try LinkedIn for 'Vans Music Marketing' or VF Corp communications.
Columbia Sportswear press contacts not publicly listed on website. Try LinkedIn for 'Columbia Sportswear PR' or 'Brand Partnerships.'
Patagonia contact page lists customer_service@patagonia.com. Press inquiries typically routed through their Ventura HQ comms team. Patagonia is selective with partnerships — values-alignment focused.
The North Face (VF Corp) press page not accessible. TNF does music/culture collabs. Try LinkedIn for 'The North Face Brand Partnerships' or VF Corp PR.
Allbirds contact page lists help@allbirds.com (CS), bulkorders@allbirds.com, legal@allbirds.com. No dedicated press email found. Smaller brand — try LinkedIn for 'Allbirds Marketing Partnerships.'

Press contacts verified at press.on-running.com. Also: press@on-running.com, emily.thompson@on-running.com. On has been doing major partnerships (Zendaya collab via Spike Jonze). Active in culture space.
Veja contact page did not return email addresses. French brand — PR may be handled through European agencies. Try LinkedIn for 'Veja PR' or 'Veja Partnerships.'
Rothy's contact page did not yield press emails. Try LinkedIn for 'Rothy's Brand Partnerships' or 'Rothy's PR.'
Vivobarefoot contact page returned minimal content. UK-based brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Vivobarefoot Marketing' or general inquiry through their site.
Altra (owned by VF Corporation) contact page minimal. Try VF Corp PR or LinkedIn for 'Altra Running Marketing.'

Verified from dsanddurga.com/pages/contact. Press: press@dsanddurga.com. Partnerships: maggie@dsanddurga.com. Wholesale: jennifer@dsanddurga.com. CS: cs@dsanddurga.com. Indie brand, very music-adjacent (founders are musicians).
Contact page exists but no emails extracted (likely form-based). Portland-based indie fragrance. Try reaching out via their contact form or Instagram DM.

Maison Margiela (owned by OTB Group) contact page has no public press emails. Fragrances licensed to L'Oreal. PR handled through L'Oreal Luxe division. Try LinkedIn for 'L'Oreal Luxe PR Manager Maison Margiela.'
Verified from phlur.com/pages/contact-us. PR via LION VIP Relations / Juliana Pires Johnson: phlur@lion-viprelations.com. Partnerships: partnerships@phlur.com. Support: support@phlur.com.
Skylar contact pages did not return emails. Clean fragrance brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Skylar Body PR' or 'Skylar Marketing.'
Henry Rose (Michelle Pfeiffer's brand) contact page did not yield press emails. Try LinkedIn for 'Henry Rose PR' — likely uses external PR agency.

From boysmells.com/pages/contact — has Press Enquiries and Wholesale Interest sections (form-based). david.kien@boysmells.com found on page. Also query@boysmells.com for general. Co-founded by David Kien and Matthew Herman.
Verified from dedcool.com/pages/contact. Partnerships: partnerships@dedcool.com. Wholesale: Wholesale@dedcool.com. General: hello@dedcool.com. Indie LA-based brand, good fit for music partnerships.
Verified from ableton.com/en/press/. Press: press@ableton.com. Press kits available. Berlin-based. Core music production brand — highly relevant for music artist partnerships.
Fender press/contact pages did not return press emails. Fender has a robust artist relations program. Try LinkedIn for 'Fender Artist Relations' or 'Fender Brand Partnerships.'
Gibson contact page did not yield press emails. Gibson has dedicated Artist Relations division. Try LinkedIn for 'Gibson Artist Relations' or 'Gibson Brand Partnerships.'
Korg contact page is form-based, no public press email found. Try LinkedIn for 'Korg USA Marketing' or 'Korg Artist Relations.'
Moog Music (Asheville, NC) contact page is form-based. Moog is deeply embedded in music culture. Try LinkedIn for 'Moog Music Marketing' or 'Moog Artist Relations.'
Roland press/contact pages did not yield emails. Roland has artist programs. Try LinkedIn for 'Roland Corporation Marketing' or 'Roland Artist Relations.'
Sennheiser press/newsroom pages did not return public emails. German company with US office. Try LinkedIn for 'Sennheiser PR' or 'Sennheiser Brand Partnerships.'
Shure press room page found webmaster@shure.com only (not press-specific). Shure has artist endorsement programs. Try LinkedIn for 'Shure Artist Relations' or 'Shure Marketing Communications.'
Beats (owned by Apple) press page did not return emails. PR handled through Apple Communications. Try LinkedIn for 'Beats by Dre Marketing' or contact Apple PR.
Sony press pages gated. For audio products, contact Sony Electronics PR. For music, Sony Music is separate entity. Try LinkedIn for 'Sony Electronics PR' or 'Sony Brand Partnerships.'
Bose press room did not return real emails (only example@domain.com placeholder). Try LinkedIn for 'Bose Brand Partnerships' or 'Bose PR Communications.'
Audio-Technica contact page is form-based. Japanese company with US HQ in Stow, OH. Try LinkedIn for 'Audio-Technica USA Marketing.'
Taylor Guitars contact page has support@taylorguitars.com (general support, not press). Taylor has artist relations program. Try LinkedIn for 'Taylor Guitars Artist Relations' or 'Taylor Guitars PR.'
Nord Keyboards (Swedish brand, Clavia) press page did not return emails. Niche keyboard brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Nord Keyboards / Clavia Marketing.'
Neumann (owned by Sennheiser) contact page did not return press emails. German brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Neumann Microphones PR' or contact through Sennheiser group.
Yamaha contact pages did not return press emails. Yamaha Corporation of America has PR team. Try LinkedIn for 'Yamaha Artist Relations' or 'Yamaha Corporation of America PR.'
Behringer (Music Tribe) press page did not return emails. Parent company Music Tribe based in Philippines. Try LinkedIn for 'Music Tribe PR' or 'Behringer Marketing.'
AKG (owned by Harman/Samsung) contact pages returned minimal content. Try LinkedIn for 'Harman Professional PR' or 'AKG Marketing.'
Universal Audio contact page minimal. UA is a key brand for producers/artists. Try LinkedIn for 'Universal Audio Marketing' or 'Universal Audio PR.'
Polaroid pages returned service@polaroid.com and privacy@polaroid.com only. Polaroid does music/culture collabs. Try LinkedIn for 'Polaroid Brand Partnerships.'
Urbanears contact page did not return emails (form-based). Swedish brand, owned by Zound Industries. Try LinkedIn for 'Zound Industries PR' or 'Urbanears Marketing.'
B&O press pages did not return public emails. Danish luxury brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Bang & Olufsen PR' or 'Bang & Olufsen Brand Partnerships.'
Aesop (owned by L'Oreal) contact/press pages gated. Aesop is very selective with partnerships and culturally curated. Try LinkedIn for 'Aesop Brand Communications' or through L'Oreal Luxe.
Dyson newsroom/contact pages returned empty. British company. Try LinkedIn for 'Dyson PR Communications' or 'Dyson Brand Partnerships.'

pr_agency: Nike Communications (PR agency, not the shoe brand)
notes: Verified from leica-camera.com/en-US/contact. PR handled by Nike Communications (a NYC-based PR agency, NOT the shoe brand). Email: leica@nikecomm.com. Also: Leicausa.repair@leica-camera.com (service only).
Apple newsroom (apple.com/newsroom) and PR (apple.com/pr) do not list public contact emails. Apple PR is notoriously gated. For Apple Music partnerships, try Apple Music for Artists program.
Rimowa (owned by LVMH) did not return press contacts. Luxury brand with active collab program. Try LinkedIn for 'Rimowa Brand Partnerships' or through LVMH PR.
Diptyque contact page returned customerservice@diptyque.us only. French luxury fragrance/candle brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Diptyque PR' or 'Diptyque Brand Communications.'
Rolex press room returned no public contacts. Rolex is extremely selective with partnerships and does not do typical brand collabs. They have Testimonee program for athletes/artists.
Smeg contacts page returned smeg@smeg.it (general/HQ Italy). Italian appliance brand with design collabs. Try LinkedIn for 'Smeg USA PR' or 'Smeg Brand Partnerships.'
Vitra contact page returned privacy@vitra.com only. Swiss design furniture brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Vitra Communications' or 'Vitra PR.'

From assouline.com/pages/contact. CS: customerservice@assouline.com. Wholesale: wholesale@assouline.com. Digital: digital@assouline.com. Has 'Partnership & Publishing Inquiries' section. Luxury publisher — good for coffee table book/content collabs.

Red Bull press/contact pages did not return emails. Red Bull has one of the most active music/culture divisions (Red Bull Music, Red Bull Records, Red Bull BC One). Try LinkedIn for 'Red Bull Music Partnerships' or 'Red Bull Culture Marketing.'

Verified from liquiddeath.com/pages/contact-us. Press: press@liquiddeath.com. Events: event@liquiddeath.com. Social: social@liquiddeath.com. Media/Podcasts: media-podcasts@liquiddeath.com. Wholesale: wholesale@liquiddeath.com. General: info@liquiddeath.com. Very active in music partnerships.
Topo Chico (owned by Coca-Cola) contact page empty. PR handled through Coca-Cola communications. Try LinkedIn for 'Topo Chico Brand Marketing' or Coca-Cola PR.
From oatly.com/en-us/contact. US: info.us@oatly.com. General: info@oatly.com. Swedish brand with strong creative/culture marketing. Oatly does music venue partnerships.
White Claw (Mark Anthony Brands) contact page did not return emails. Has done music festival sponsorships. Try LinkedIn for 'White Claw Brand Partnerships' or 'Mark Anthony Brands PR.'
Casamigos (owned by Diageo) contact page did not yield press emails. PR likely handled through Diageo PR. Try LinkedIn for 'Diageo PR Casamigos' or 'Casamigos Brand Partnerships.'
Hendrick's Gin (William Grant & Sons) contact page did not return emails. Try LinkedIn for 'William Grant & Sons PR' or 'Hendrick's Brand Partnerships.'
Aperol (owned by Campari Group) contact page did not return emails. Aperol Spritz does music/event partnerships. Try LinkedIn for 'Campari Group PR' or 'Aperol Brand Partnerships.'
Notion magazine (notion.so/press for the app, but the magazine is notionmagazine.com). UK-based music/culture magazine. Try hello@notionmagazine.com or LinkedIn for 'Notion Magazine Editor.'
Verified from theface.com/about. General: hello@theface.com. Advertising: advertising@theface.com. Iconic UK culture/fashion magazine relaunched in 2019.
Vogue (Conde Nast) contact page did not return Vogue-specific emails. Conde Nast handles PR centrally. Try LinkedIn for 'Vogue Partnerships' or Conde Nast communications.

Verified from dazeddigital.com/contact. Advertising/Partnerships: partnerships@dazedmedia.com. PR: pr@dazedmedia.com. Studio: hello@dazed.studio. Finance: finance@dazedmedia.com. Dazed Media includes Dazed, AnOther, Nowness.
i-D (Vice Media) contact/about pages did not return emails. i-D is now under new ownership after Vice bankruptcy. Try LinkedIn for 'i-D Magazine Editor' or check their social media for contact info.

Verified from pitchfork.com/contact. News/press releases: news@pitchfork.com. Press inquiries: caroline_brooks@condenast.com. Help: help@pitchfork.com. Corrections: corrections@pitchfork.com. Pitchfork is now under GQ (Conde Nast).
Verified from rollingstone.com/contact. Editor tips/press releases: tips@rollingstone.com. Letters: letters@rollingstone.com. Licensing: PMC@wrightsmedia.com (Penske Media Corp). Owned by PMC.
Verified from nme.com/contact. Press: press@nme.com. Editors: editors@nme.com. Advertising/Partnerships: advertise@nme.com. Licensing: licensing@nme.com. Letters: letters@nme.com.
Verified from thefader.com/contact. Media inquiries/PR: pr@thefader.com. Advertising: advertising@thefader.com. Key music/culture publication.
Hypebeast about page (Hypemedia) did not return public emails. Parent company is Hypemedia (publicly traded in HK). Try LinkedIn for 'Hypebeast Partnerships' or 'Hypemedia Brand Partnerships.'
Highsnobiety about/contact pages returned only accessibility@highsnobiety.com. Berlin-based. Try LinkedIn for 'Highsnobiety Brand Partnerships' or 'Highsnobiety Editorial.'
From complex.com/contact. General: info@complex.com. ComplexCon: info@complexcon.com. Marketplace: marketplace.team@complex.com. Complex is owned by BuzzFeed/NTWRK.
From refinery29.com. feedback@refinery29.com. Refinery29 is owned by Vice Media Group (now restructured). Try LinkedIn for 'Refinery29 Brand Partnerships.'
From allure.com/contact. Letters/editorial: letters@allure.com. Ad sales: adsales@allure.com. Awards: allureawards@condenast.com. Conde Nast brand.
Byrdie (Dotdash Meredith) returned contentlicensing@people.inc, support@people.inc. Try LinkedIn for 'Byrdie Editor' or 'Dotdash Meredith Brand Partnerships.'
Elle (Hearst) US contact page did not return US-specific emails (returned Dutch edition contacts). Try LinkedIn for 'Elle US Partnerships' or Hearst Communications PR.
Harper's Bazaar (Hearst) contact page did not return press emails. Try LinkedIn for 'Harper's Bazaar Brand Partnerships' or Hearst Communications.
GQ (Conde Nast) contact page did not return GQ-specific emails. Try LinkedIn for 'GQ Brand Partnerships' or Conde Nast ad sales.
Esquire (Hearst) contact page did not return emails. Try LinkedIn for 'Esquire Brand Partnerships' or Hearst Communications.
Into the Gloss (owned by Glossier) contact/about pages did not return emails. The site is less active since Glossier pivot. Try LinkedIn for Glossier PR team.
Goop contact/press pages did not return emails. Gwyneth Paltrow's brand. Try LinkedIn for 'Goop PR' or 'Goop Brand Partnerships.'
From stereogum.com/contact. Advertising: danielle@stereogum.com. Also tom breihan (editor) previously at tombreihan@gmail.com. Indie music blog — good for press/features.

From thehundreds.com/pages/about. Sales: sales@thehundreds.com. Service: service@thehundreds.com. Streetwear/culture brand founded by Bobby Hundreds. Try LinkedIn for 'The Hundreds Brand Partnerships.'
